channel.title: Home-Office-Setup on Work From Home Pro
channel.description: Recent content in Home-Office-Setup on Work From Home Pro

item.title: How to Set Up a Home Office for Under $1,000 (That Doesn't Suck)
item.description:
My first home office was a kitchen table and a folding chair. My back hurt within a week. Six years later — and after spending way too much on gear I didn’t need and not enough on gear I did — here’s what I’d tell myself if I could do it over.

You don’t need $3,000 worth of equipment. You need the right $700-900 worth.

What’s Actually Causing Your Discomfort

Before buying anything: most home office discomfort comes from three things, in order of impact:
